mapper.insert: insert into t_admin (adminId, adminName, adminPassword, adminXingming, adminSex, adminAge, adminPhone, adminMark, adminMark1, adminMark2, adminMark3, adminMark4, adminDate, adminDate1, adminDate2, adminType, adminType1, adminType2, adminDouble, adminDouble1, adminDouble2, adminZong, adminZong1, adminZong2, adminImg, adminImgName) values (#{adminId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminPassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminXingming,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminSex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminAge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminMark1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminMark2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminMark3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminMark4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{adminDate1,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{adminDate2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{adminType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminType1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminType2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminDouble,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{adminDouble1,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{adminDouble2,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{adminZong,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminZong1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminZong2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminImgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update t_admin set adminName = #{adminName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminPassword = #{adminPassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminXingming = #{adminXingming,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminSex = #{adminSex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminAge = #{adminAge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminPhone = #{adminPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminMark = #{adminMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminMark1 = #{adminMark1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminMark2 = #{adminMark2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminMark3 = #{adminMark3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminMark4 = #{adminMark4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminDate = #{adminDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, adminDate1 = #{adminDate1,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, adminDate2 = #{adminDate2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, adminType = #{adminType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminType1 = #{adminType1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminType2 = #{adminType2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminDouble = #{adminDouble,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, adminDouble1 = #{adminDouble1,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, adminDouble2 = #{adminDouble2,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, adminZong = #{adminZong,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminZong1 = #{adminZong1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminZong2 = #{adminZong2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminImg = #{adminImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminImgName = #{adminImgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where adminId = #{adminId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select adminId, adminName, adminPassword, adminXingming, adminSex, adminAge, adminPhone, adminMark, adminMark1, adminMark2, adminMark3, adminMark4, adminDate, adminDate1, adminDate2, adminType, adminType1, adminType2, adminDouble, adminDouble1, adminDouble2, adminZong, adminZong1, adminZong2, adminImg, adminImgName from t_admin where adminId = #{adminId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
